heading: Attorney’s fees
label: 12205 Attorney’s fees
text: In any action or administrative proceeding commenced pursuant to this chapter, the court or agency, in its discretion, may allow the prevailing party, other than the United States, a reasonable attorney’s fee, including litigation expenses, and costs, and the United States shall be liable for the foregoing the same as a private individual.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , , which is classified principally to this chapter.
